title: melica ramosa var. eligulata
intro: Melica ramosa var. eligulata, commonly known as the sweet grass or sweet grass melica, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Melica ramosa var. eligulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melica ramosa var. eligulata can be made by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by making a tincture with a combination of water and glycerin.
